channel.title: Active on CEDIS
channel.description: Recent content in Active on CEDIS

item.title: People
item.description: Works on the development of Evidentia Review, a CEDIS software platform for systematic literature reviews.

item.title: Artificial intelligence and data analysis for digital transformation
item.description: Ongoing umbrella project focused on applying artificial intelligence, machine learning, natural language processing, and data analysis to digital transformation initiatives.

item.title: Digital innovation and gamification for teaching, outreach, and software engineering
item.description: Ongoing umbrella project focused on research and development of digital strategies, gamification, indicators, and educational products for teaching, science outreach, and software engineering.

item.title: A3M: Educational innovation with active methodologies
item.description: Ongoing project associated with the Learning for the Third Millennium Program, focused on educational innovation, active methodologies, and learning indicators at the University of Brasília.
